label: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR)

node.label: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR)
node.definition: RLVR improves a policy using rewards computed by deterministic or highly reliable verifiers such as tests, exact answers, simulators, or proof kernels.
node.why_it_matters: It scales post-training feedback in domains where correctness can be checked automatically.
limitations: Verifiable endpoints can reward shortcuts, reduce solution diversity, or omit qualities that are difficult to formalize.

dependencies.rationale: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) uses Reinforcement learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Outcome verifiers & executable rewards.
Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) uses Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) uses Data augmentation & synthetic-data generation as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
